from dsl import *

def solve_eb5a1d5d(I):
    x1 = compose(dmirror, dedupe)
    x2 = x1(I)
    x3 = x1(x2)
    x4 = fork(remove, last, identity)
    x5 = compose(hmirror, x4)
    x6 = fork(vconcat, identity, x5)
    x7 = x6(x3)
    x8 = dmirror(x7)
